name: Karui
description: Karui is a kunoichi of Kumogakure, and a member of Team Samui. The team was sent to Konoha by the [Fourth Raikage](https://anilist.co/character/22894) to inform them that they would be taking care of [Sasuke Uchiha](https://anilist.co/character/13) and Akatsuki. She, along with the other two members of her team, are [Killer Bee](https://anilist.co/character/18473)'s students. Karui seems to have a somewhat comedic-negative relationship with her teammate, [Omoi](https://anilist.co/character/22872

name: Katejina Loos
description: Katejina is a strong-willed seventeen year old girl from Woowing. Separated from her parents around the time of the destruction of her home town by the invading BESPA forces of the Zanscare Empire, Katejina joins the League Militaire with young Uso Evin. However, Katejina disapproves of the League's reliance on Uso as a gundam pilot due the mounting toll on his young body and mind. ~!Katejina is captured by Lt. Cronicle Asher and taken to the Zanscare Empire where she becomes Cronicle's personal

name: Keitarou Gentouga
description: Keitaro Gentoga is a young man with a spiritual constitution, the tutor of Yayoi Hozuki and the childhood friend of Eiko Hozuki. He can feel the presence of supernatural beings, and his presence attracts supernatural beings, even Yayoi who can see supernatural beings is often ignored. In order to not be easily possessed, Keitarou was taught by his grandmother to exercise and meditate regularly, because supernatural beings have difficulty possessing people with healthy bodies and minds, as a resu

name: Kuzuha Togashi
description: Kuzuha is Yuuta's younger sister who is in the first year of junior high school. She knows Yuuta very well, especially how he acted during his Chuunibyou days in middle school as Dark Flame Master, though she always considered him embarrassing. Kuzuha got used to her older brother's delusions since she was young. Every once in a while she would ponder if her brother's acts were actually cool before immediately dismissing the thought as Yuuta would spectacularly embarrass himself yet again.

name: Maria Kawai
description: The protagonist of the story, Maria has a cold personality which estranges herself from her classmates. She says what she wants, albeit too bluntly and harsh, even when she intends to help others. Her arrogant facade and point blank statements are the reasons she is hated by most people and it seems she too is indifferent towards them. Emphasized throughout the manga, Maria also is shown to have the ability to see the true natures of people around her, or—more simply—their flaws. Alt

name: Meika
description: She works as a maid for Kota. She is infatuated with him, but she cannot show her feelings. ~!In later chapters, she confesses her love to him and they become a couple.!~

name: Melona
description: Melona is one of the four servants of The Swamp Witch and her strongest minion. Nicknamed "The Protean Assassin" due to her nearly unlimited ability to change form at will, she is skilled in obtaining information and assassination. It is assumed that she was ordered to bring about chaos to the Queen's Blade tournament. Seductive and alluring, she revels in humiliating her opponents and will not hesitate to kill them if given the opportunity. Despite her malevolent nature she hates being called a

name: Michella Watch
description: The younger sister of Leo. She is unable to walk since birth. When visiting Hellsalem's Lot, she lost her eyesight in order to let Leo keep his and gain the "All-Seeing Eyes of God".

name: Michiru Morishita
description: __Height:__ 155cm Michiru is a first-year student and Isara's classmate. She is a newcomer who joined Shokken just before the student council election. She has a habit of staying out late at night.

name: Miou Ootori
description: An 18-year-old high school senior, Miou is the club president of the Aogiri High School Survival Game Club. She came from a rich family and her beauty and charisma made her well respected in school. She seems to lack common sense and is quite forgetful. She was held back a year in high school because of misconduct, and thus the only club member old enough to apply for a license for the model guns the other members are too young to use.
mediaTitles: Sabagebu! - Survival Game Club! - OVA Special Mission
searchTerms: Sabagebu! - Survival Game Club! - OVA Special Mission

name: Miyako
description: __Race:__ Fiend Miyako has an endless appetite for pudding and often makes it her top priority. She gets extremely angry when pudding gets taken away from her or if someone else eats her pudding. During the rare occasions where the pudding is not on her mind, Miyako acts fairly childlike, and occasionally plays pranks on others. She is a member of the guild 'Diabolos'. (Source: Princess Connect! Re:Dive Wiki)
mediaTitles: Princess Connect! Michibiki no Hatsuhana: Fiore Storia

name: Moka Aoshima
description: Moka is a singer-songwriter. She made her debut as singer once but, since she's unable to follow-up, she ends up working as a part timer in Tokyo while chasing her dream. She and the protagonist are childhood friends and they reunited by chance in Tokyo. (Source: Wikipedia)
